zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Cheddar於大約1425年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親Thomas Cheddar47歲，母親Isabel Scobhull23歲。她於大約1440年與Richard Stafford結婚。她去世於1464年7月15日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾斯利享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Cheddar于大约1425年出生在英国薩默塞特时，她的父亲Thomas Cheddar47岁，母亲Isabel Scobhull23岁。她于大约1440年与Richard Stafford结婚。她去世于1464年7月15日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾斯利享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特威爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Cheddar was born about 1425, in Somerset, England, her father, Thomas Cheddar, was 47 and her mother, Isabel Scobhull, was 23. She married Richard Stafford about 1440. She died on 15 July 1464, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Wells, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Cheddar est née environ 1425, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Cheddar, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Isabel Scobhull, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Stafford environ 1440. Elle est décédée le 15 juillet 1464, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Wells, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Cheddar um 1425 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Cheddar 47 und ihre Mutter Isabel Scobhull 23. Sie hat um 1440 Richard Stafford geheiratet. Sie starb am 15. Juli 1464 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wells, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Cheddar è nata il circa 1425 nel Somerset, England, sua padre, Thomas Cheddar, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Isabel Scobhull, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Richard Stafford circa 1440. Morì il 15 luglio 1464, nel Astley, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Wells, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Cheddarが約1425年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Thomas Cheddarは47歳，母Isabel Scobhullは23歳であった。約1440年にRichard Staffordと結婚した。彼女は1464年7月15日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトウエルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Cheddar(이)가 대략 1425년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Cheddar(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Scobhull(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1440년 Richard Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1464년 7월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 웰스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Cheddar nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Cheddar, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Scobhull, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Stafford aproximadamente 1440. Ela faleceu em 15 de julho de 1464, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Wells, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Cheddar родилась около 1425 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Cheddar было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Scobhull, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Stafford около 1440 г. Она умерла 15 июля 1464 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности веллс, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Cheddar nació aproximadamente 1425, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Cheddar, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Isabel Scobhull, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Richard Stafford aproximadamente 1440. Murió el 15 de julio de 1464, en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Wells, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
